faqs.question: What is Tenachin Telehealth?
faqs.answer: Tenachin is Ethiopia’s first all-in-one digital healthcare platform. We connect patients to doctors—general doctors, specialists, subspecialists, and allied health professionals—via video, voice, and text.

faqs.question: What kind of services does Tenachin offer?
faqs.answer:
We offer a wide range of services including:
• General & Specialist medical Consultations
• Emergency & ICU Teleconsultation
• Mental Health & Counseling
• Maternal, Neonatal & Child Health
• Chronic Disease Management

faqs.question: How can I access Tenachin’s services?
faqs.answer:
You can access Tenachin through:
• Our mobile app (Android/iOS)
• Short code SMS services
• Direct phone calls: +251978224422
• Visiting our physical centers

faqs.question: Is Tenachin available 24/7?
faqs.answer: Yes! Tenachin provides 24/7 access to doctors and specialists. Whether it's midnight chest pain or early morning fever, we’re here to help—any time, any day.
